title: neltuma calingastana
intro: Neltuma calingastana, also known as the "Calingastana plant," is a type of flowering plant in the Neltuma genus, native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. The plant has various health benefits, such as reducing fever, treating respiratory issues, and alleviating pain, making it a popular remedy for common ailments. Herbal preparations of Neltuma calingastana can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are often used to treat a range of health conditions.
